donar.title: Donate to Venezuela — Verified aid channels
donar.desc: A list of verified channels to donate and help Venezuela after the earthquake. Every link goes straight to the official organization.
donar.p: Verified channels to help after the earthquake. Every button takes you straight to the official organization.
donar.foot.note: Independent aggregator · We don't handle money or charge any commission
donar.foot.add: Add this widget to your website
head.title: Help Venezuela — Donation widget for your website
head.desc: Add a bar or popup to your site (WordPress, Wix or HTML) with verified channels to donate to Venezuela. Free, lightweight and updatable without reinstalling.
hero.h1: 💜 Your website can help save lives in Venezuela
hero.p: Thousands of families lost everything after the earthquake. Everyone who visits your page wants to help, but doesn't know where to do it safely. You can show them. Add a discreet bar with verified channels to donate: it takes 2 minutes, it's completely free and it takes nothing away from your site… but for someone in Venezuela it can mean everything.
hero.cta: I want to help from my website
como.lead: You install a small snippet just once. The list of organizations lives in the cloud (a config.json file) and updates for everyone at once.
como.c1.d: WordPress plugin, Wix code, iframe or a simple <script> for any website.
como.c2.d: A discreet bar appears at the bottom (or a button / popup, your choice). It doesn't block your content.
como.c3.t: 3. Done and always up to date
como.c3.d: When new aid channels are verified, your widget updates on its own. You don't have to touch a thing.
gen.lead: Customize and copy. It works on any HTML site, and on Wix with a code block.
wp.lead: With a settings panel, Gutenberg block and shortcode.
sop.lead: Installation and support are completely free, at no cost at all. If you have questions about placing the widget on your site, write to me and I'll gladly help.
conf.lead: This project is an independent aggregator. We don't receive or handle money and charge no commission: each button links straight to the organization's official page. We verify every channel before listing it and show the source. See a suspicious or broken link? Report it here.
